detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use sysmonpsv driver.

sect1.title: xsysmonpsv_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XSysMonPsv driver directly. This example sets a New Data interrupt for a supply and reads the data on driver in polled mode. For details, see xsysmonpsv_polled_example.c.

sect1.title: xsysmonpsv_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XSysMonPsv driver directly. This example demonstrates how to set up interrupts and a callback handler for sysmon. For details, see xsysmonpsv_intr_example.c.
